case_title: BORJA-ESCOBAR ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. PART. vs. WASHINGTON, JEFFREY

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORJA-ESCOBAR ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. PART. SERVED JUL-02-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JEFFREY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORJA-ESCOBAR ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. PART. AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JEFFREY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JEFFREY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORJA-ESCOBAR ASSOCIATES, A CALIF. PART. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JEFFREY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 84 SIXTH ST, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE [CRC 522]
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, JEFFREY
